title: AEP v1.1 A7 Doctrine Citation Drift Velocity
description: v1.1 A7 amendment (STRONGLY PLAUSIBLE × CONTEXT-BOUND PATTERN). Two-agent convergence (warden-IDEA-3 + scout context). Was F11b in legion synthesis; split out as independent amendment per HV-6 closure. Counter of amended citations per packet. Surfaces doctrine slots whose cites are stale (frequently amended in citing packets). Composes_with: sec41 HCRL row attribution, sec73.3 prior-art-inheritance-audit, F18 source_provenance_graph.

bound_to_doctrine_slot.description: Doctrine slot ID this drift-velocity counter tracks (e.g., 'sec73', 'sec41').

amended_citation_count.description: Number of times this slot's citation appeared in a packet that was later amended.

amendment_event_ids.description: F17 PacketHistoryEvent ids of the amendments. Forms the audit trail.

drift_velocity_per_week.description: Validator-computed: amended_citation_count / weeks_in_window. High = unstable doctrine; surface to curator.
